subcodes.first_line: How many servants and handmaidens there are who, night and day, occupy themselves with the recitation of divine Books and heavenly Scriptures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه مقدار از عباد و اماء که در شب و روز بتلاوت کتب الهیه و صحف ربانیه مشغول
subcodes.subjects: @literal interpretation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
